scope.source_policy: PC Japanese source with PC EN/SC/TC semantic cross-checks only; no Switch Korean source is used.
scope.application_boundary: This audit approves only these three pinned static literal edits. Runtime rendering still requires separate real-game QA before visual completion can be claimed.

pristine_pc_jp_literals: に槍傷をくれてやったぞ！

pc_cross_language_evidence.en: I’ve given [target] a taste of my spear.

records.reason: The source has a demonstrative before the preserved runtime span; the Korean attacker label is source-unrelated. Only literal slot 0 changes and all opaque spans remain byte-identical.

pristine_pc_jp_literals:
主を支うるは真の副将の役目にて
この場は

pc_cross_language_evidence.en: Supporting the leader is the faithful adjutant’s duty. Leave it to me!
pc_cross_language_evidence.sc: 辅佐主人乃副将真正的使命。这里就请交给……吧！
pc_cross_language_evidence.tc: 真正的副将，职责乃是辅佐主公。请将这里交给在下！

records.reason: The source treats the preserved runtime span as the person receiving the task. The Korean role-label fragment is source-unrelated; the fixed literal omits it without changing the runtime span or line count.

current_literals:

“평정중” 명령의 “증설”이 해금되었습니다.
금전을 지불해 봉행의 최대 인원을 늘릴 수 있습니다.

pristine_pc_jp_literals:
政策「制度改新・弐」がLV2に上がったため
「評定衆」コマンドの「増設」が解放されました。
金銭を支払うことで奉行の最大数を増やせます。

【解放された内容】
　・「評定衆」コマンドの「増設」
records.reason: The final unlock bullet needs the same possessive construction already used in the preceding line. The edit does not touch controls or manual newlines.
